stimulus: Beginning in the 1970s, Mexican-American physician Helen Rodríguez Trías worked tirelessly to expand health-care access for women and children; this ______blank effort involved testifying before Congress, traveling to clinics across the country, and writing extensively about reproductive rights.
stem: Which choice completes the text with the most logical and precise word or phrase?
rationale: Choice A is correct because "tireless" matches "worked tirelessly" earlier in the sentence and describes someone who works steadily over a long time. Choices B, C, and D all suggest weak or detached effort, which contradicts the description of her years of dedicated work.
